title: trigonochilum macropus
intro: Trigonochilum macropus, also known as the Stinking Spearwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used by the indigenous people for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Trigonochilum macropus can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing users to harness its medicinal benefits.
